locale_picker.label: Language
locale_picker.contribute: Help us translate Tournamental into your language
home.hero.headline_a: Can you predict the entire World Cup?
home.hero.headline_b: Twenty-two World Cups, 964 matches, zero perfect brackets.
home.hero.lede: Nobody has ever done it, and they probably never will because of the astronomical {odds_link}. Twenty-two World Cups, 964 matches, and the perfect bracket has stayed unclaimed. The 104 matches of 2026 are the next attempt. Tournamental keeps the global ledger and commits every pick to the blockchain before each match kicks off, so your predictions are immutable and any claim to glory is finally provable.
home.hero.lede_link: odds of getting all 104 matches right
join.modal.title: Join {pool_name}
join.modal.body: Pick a display name and handle for the leaderboard, then we'll send a one-time login code by WhatsApp or email.
join.modal.field_email_help: If you don't use WhatsApp, enter your email address to get a one-time code. Provide either, or both, we send the code to every channel you give us.
join.modal.footnote: By joining you agree to our terms. We only use your contact details for sign-in, no marketing, no third parties.
join.success.body_pending: Your request to join {pool_name} has been sent to the pool administrator. You'll get a notification when they accept it.
join.error.phone_registered_body: If it's yours, log in via WhatsApp instead, you'll get the one-time code and a tap-to-sign-in link, then we add you to {pool_name} automatically.
odds.title: Nobody will pick all 104 matches of the World Cup correctly. Ever.
odds.lede: The compounding kills you, the coin-flip matches set a floor information can't crack, and the lock-everything-upfront games are mathematically broken before the first whistle. Here's the working.
syndicate.members: {count, plural, =0 {No members yet} one {# member} other {# members}}
syndicate.picks_made: {count, plural, =0 {No picks made yet} one {# pick made} other {# picks made}}
syndicate.join_footnote: Free to play, change picks until kickoff.
footer.fifa_disclaimer: Tournamental is independent and not affiliated with FIFA, the FIFA World Cup, or any of its sponsors. FIFA World Cup 2026™ is a trademark of Fédération Internationale de Football Association.
footer.contribute_translation: Help translate Tournamental into your language: {link}
languages.hero.headline: Tournamental, in your language
languages.hero.intro1: We're working with native speakers to ship Tournamental in 22 languages by kickoff. First-pass copy is machine-assisted; native-speaker pull requests are how every locale becomes really good.
languages.hero.intro2: Tap a language below to switch. Your choice is remembered for a year on this device.
languages.contribute_link: Help us translate Tournamental into your language
home.final.headline: Three steps. Five minutes. Free.
home.final.q1_body: Open the bracket, save your World Cup. Takes about five minutes the first time.
home.final.q2_body: The FIFA World Cup 2026 kicks off 11 June. Save once, change any pick right up to kickoff, watch your prediction IQ climb the global leaderboard.
home.final.q3_body: Like the experience? Spin up a pool, brand it, invite your friends or your audience. Free or premium.
home.step1.headline: Set your picks now.
home.step1.lede: 104 matches, 48 teams, one bracket. Pick winners, draw amounts, and group standings. Save once, then tweak every match right up until kickoff. Earlier saves earn a bigger multiplier; lock everything in when you're ready and watch your prediction IQ climb.
home.step1.b1_body: Unlike Telegraph, ESPN, or Yahoo, nothing locks at the first whistle. Every match is its own decision.
home.step1.b2_body: Call Argentina to win the final today and the points are worth more than calling it the night before.
home.step1.b3_body: Each prediction is timestamped and signed (a VStamp). Your record is yours, transferable across syndicates.
home.step2.headline: Run a pool. Brand it your way.
home.step2.claim: The only World Cup prediction platform where anyone can launch a fully branded, embeddable pool with custom prize splits and verifiable on-chain settlement, in minutes.
home.step2.lede: A pool is your own branded prediction pool. Pick a name, drop the embed widget on any site (Squarespace, WordPress, Shopify, your blog), and run a six-week sweepstake for your audience. Set an entry fee and prize splits, or keep it free for bragging rights. Tournamental never touches the money.
home.step2.cta_note: See the embed widget, snippet, and prize-split mechanics on the pools page.
home.tier_free.name: Branded embed widget
home.tier_free.b1: Drop one snippet on any site, any CMS
home.tier_free.b2: Brand it with your logo, colours, prize copy
home.tier_free.b4: Off-platform entry money (you handle the cash)
home.tier_free.b5: Sponsor block on every share card
home.tier_premium.b3: Your own phone number for SMS + WhatsApp at scale
home.tier_premium.b4: Stripe Checkout for paid entries (funds to your bank)
home.tier_aside: Premium tier is delivered by Aiva, our CRM and messaging partner. Tournamental never handles entry fees or prize money.
home.features.headline: Why people stay
home.features.f1_body: Every pick gets a cryptographic VStamp before kickoff. Your record is portable, public, and yours for life.
home.features.f2_body: Apache 2.0 code, CC-BY docs, contributor revenue share via Drips. Fork it, host it yourself, or stay with us.
home.features.f3_body: Match-day quizzes, line bets, score-input games via the Telegram bot. Six weeks of touchpoints, not five minutes of form-fill.
home.features.f4_body: StatsBomb open data, Polymarket odds, public team data. We pay our data sources; they share in upside.
